title: Bargain Bazaar
short_description: Every stall swears it has the best deal — compare prices, discounts and 3-for-2 tricks and tap the true bargain before the shopkeepers fool you.
description: Welcome to the world's noisiest market, where every stall SWEARS it has the best deal! Compare the prices, work out the discounts, and see through the sneaky '3-for-2' tricks to tap the stall that's the true bargain. It teaches real money smarts: comparing prices, calculating a percent off, and finding the best unit value. Grade bands ramp from simply picking the cheaper price, to working out sale discounts, to comparing value-per-item across multipacks. A free online money, discounts and best-value shopping game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the stall offering the best deal.
